mapper.select: SELECT id, name, icon_url, condition_type, condition_value, description FROM t_badge ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT b.id, b.name, b.icon_url, b.condition_type, b.condition_value, b.description, CASE WHEN ub.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS unlocked, ub.unlocked_at FROM t_badge b LEFT JOIN t_user_badge ub ON ub.badge_id = b.id AND ub.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY b.id ASC
SELECT badge_id FROM t_user_badge WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO t_user_badge (user_id, badge_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{badgeId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_score WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_practice_log WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_practice_plan WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_setlist WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_friendship WHERE (user_id_1 = #{userId} OR user_id_2 = #{userId}) AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_song_request WHERE sender_id = #{userId}
